title_en: 4. Take care of the home environment
content_en: The environmental aspects of homes and workplaces are very crucial factors affecting human health. Many of the Prophet's (~) recommendations lead the way to healthy home comfort, for example: «Cover the pots and water bottles.» 357 This advice aims at preventing the contamination of food and drink through contact with microbes, insects or dust. «Do not leave the fire lit in your homes while you are sleeping: this fire is your enemy so put it out before you sleep.» 358 This hadith is explained by the fact that fire can blaze out of control while the occupants of the house are sleeping; but we can also interpret it another way. Fire causes the release of carbon monoxide, an odourless gas which has a high binding affinity to human haemoglobin in the red blood cells. The resulting bond makes the cells lose their ability to bind to the oxygen molecules, leading to a 355 Rosenthal, 2001. 356 According to lbn Majah this hadith has a weak chain, but is strengthened by the sound hadith before it in lbn Majah's collection, in which Allah's Messenger (~) says: "Do not be wasteful, do not be wasteful!" 357 Muslim, lbn Majah and Al)med. 358 Al-Bukhari. reduction in the level of blood oxygen which, if continued, leads to certain death. Furthermore, if we apply this advice to our modem home environment, we will see that many toxic chemicals are generated from gas cookers, furnaces and boilers, so turning these off at bedtime is a safeguard against potential hazards. The Prophet (~) also said: «Tum off the lamps while sleeping.» 359 The use of electric lights with the subsequent elongation of the 'daylight' hours causes the pineal gland to release hormones that (among other potentially harmful changes) stimulates early puberty in young females. 360 So turning off all lamps, even dim lights, when we sleep saves us from many problems caused by hormonal imbalances. A recently discovered household pollutant is electromagnetic radiation. Living, working or sleeping in the vicinity of power or telephone lines, or any major source of electromagnetic field, and the increased use of mobile phones will negatively affect our health. Until recently, medical science has not paid much attention to the health hazards of energetic toxins, as their effects are not recognisable in the short term. Dr. Andrew Weil warns that the danger of damage to your brain and the rest of your body associated with exposure to electromagnetic radiation is directly proportional to the cumulative amount of radiation received over your lifetime. So do not underestimate any small dose of radiation, as it adds to your total exposure and increases your risk of health problems. 361 359 Al-Bukhari. 360 Borysenko, 1998. 36 t Weil, 1998. Although the electromagnetic field produced by the appliances we have in our homes may be weak, it can still adversely affect our biological system, impairing our immunity and causing serious, sometimes irreversible genetic damage. According to Dr. Weil, the farther we are from an electric appliance, the safer we are, Protection against Microwave Hazards • Do not stand close to an operating microwave as it emits electromagnetic rays • Do not cook in it for an extended period of time as this tends to change the food chemistry, creating a potentially harmful unnatural molecule • Do not use plastic wrappings or plastic containers in the microwaves (even if labelled microwave safe - safety here is meant for the plastic, not for you), as they release carcinogenic plasticizer polymers inside your food as the strength of the electromagnetic field decreases by moving away from its emitting source. Examples of the equipment commonly used in our homes that release electromagnetic radiation are: mobile phones, computer monitors, electric blankets, electronic clocks, alarms and radios and microwave ovens 362 . So remember to leave a distance of at least half a meter between any electronic or electric device and your bed. The cleanliness of the home environment is of major concern to Muslims, and cleanliness in tum is of prime importance in 362 Weil, 1998. preventative medicine. Prophet Muhammad (~) said: «Allah is Beautiful and He loves beauty, He is Good-hearted and He loves goodness, He is Clean and He loves cleanliness; so clean your backyards.» 363 He also said: «Whenever one of you goes to bed, dust off your bed with your clothes, as you never know what was on it after you.» 364 In the early seventies, science (r-~ organisms present in hous~ dust an~ bed t\\· . covers that cause allergies and itchy \ skin. To prevent their proliferation, ~ proper aeration is essential. It is also important to clean your home and bedding frequently, and to allow the sun and fresh clean air into rooms daily. 365 Remember this piece of advice from the Medicine of the Prophet (~): "Bum incense in your homes with frankincense and thyme." Aromatherapy has been used for centuries in many cultures for both healing and relaxation. Vaporizers and different essential oils are now generally available in health shops, where hundreds of scents are promoted for calming, uplifting, general healing or purifying purposes. Frankincense is widely known for its cleansing and purifying powers; some cultures also use it for spiritual enhancement. Other essential oils like chamomile, sage, lavender and jasmine have calming effects, while grapefruit, rosemary and rose are popular for their uplifting nature. Peppermint, ginger and eucalyptus and perhaps even thyme are said to have stimulating essences.366 363 Tirmidhi. 364 Bukhari . Ibrahim, A. S. (~1..r.1 .Jr u-i), 2004. 365 366 Peters & Woodham, 2000.
content_id:
Aspek lingkungan rumah dan tempat kerja adalah faktor yang sangat penting yang mempengaruhi kesehatan manusia. Banyak rekomendasi Nabi ﷺ yang menunjukkan jalan menuju kenyamanan rumah yang sehat, misalnya: «Tutup panci dan botol air.»357 Saran ini bertujuan untuk mencegah kontaminasi makanan dan minuman melalui kontak dengan mikroba, serangga, atau debu. «Jangan biarkan api menyala di rumahmu saat kamu tidur: api ini adalah musuhmu, maka padamkanlah sebelum kamu tidur.»358 Hadis ini dijelaskan oleh fakta bahwa api bisa berkobar di luar kendali sementara penghuni rumah sedang tidur; tetapi kita juga dapat menginterpretasikannya dengan cara lain. Api menyebabkan pelepasan karbon monoksida, gas tidak berbau yang memiliki afinitas pengikatan tinggi terhadap hemoglobin manusia dalam sel darah merah. Ikatan yang dihasilkan membuat sel-sel kehilangan kemampuan mereka untuk berikatan dengan molekul oksigen, yang mengarah pada pengurangan kadar oksigen darah yang, jika berlanjut, menyebabkan kematian. Nabi ﷺ juga bersabda: «Padamkan lampu saat tidur.»359 Penggunaan lampu listrik dengan perpanjangan jam 'siang' yang diakibatkannya menyebabkan kelenjar pineal melepaskan hormon yang (di antara perubahan berpotensi berbahaya lainnya) merangsang pubertas dini pada perempuan muda. Jadi mematikan semua lampu, bahkan lampu redup, saat kita tidur menghindarkan kita dari banyak masalah yang disebabkan oleh ketidakseimbangan hormonal.

Polutan rumah tangga yang baru ditemukan adalah radiasi elektromagnetik. Tinggal, bekerja, atau tidur di sekitar jalur listrik atau telepon, atau sumber utama medan elektromagnetik apa pun, dan peningkatan penggunaan ponsel akan berdampak negatif pada kesehatan kita. Meskipun medan elektromagnetik yang dihasilkan oleh peralatan yang kita miliki di rumah mungkin lemah, tetap saja dapat berdampak buruk pada sistem biologis kita, melemahkan kekebalan dan menyebabkan kerusakan genetik yang serius dan kadang tidak dapat diperbaiki. Ingatlah untuk meninggalkan jarak minimal setengah meter antara perangkat elektronik atau listrik apa pun dan tempat tidur Anda.

Kebersihan lingkungan rumah merupakan perhatian utama bagi umat Islam, dan kebersihan pada gilirannya sangat penting dalam pengobatan preventif. Nabi Muhammad ﷺ bersabda: «Allah itu Indah dan Dia menyukai keindahan, Dia Baik Hati dan Dia menyukai kebaikan, Dia Bersih dan Dia menyukai kebersihan; maka bersihkanlah halaman rumahmu.»363 Beliau juga bersabda: «Kapan pun salah seorang dari kalian pergi tidur, kibaslah tempat tidurmu dengan pakaianmu, karena kamu tidak pernah tahu apa yang ada di atasnya setelah kamu pergi.»364 Penting untuk membersihkan rumah dan tempat tidur Anda dengan sering, serta membiarkan sinar matahari dan udara segar yang bersih masuk ke kamar setiap hari. Ingatlah nasihat dari Thibbun Nabawi: "Bakarlah kemenyan di rumahmu dengan frankincense dan thyme." Aromaterapi telah digunakan selama berabad-abad di banyak budaya untuk penyembuhan dan relaksasi. Frankincense dikenal luas karena kekuatan pembersihan dan pemurniannya.
content_ar: تُمثّل الجوانب البيئية للمنازل وأماكن العمل عوامل بالغة الأهمية في صحة الإنسان. وقد فتحت كثير من توصيات النبي ﷺ الباب أمام بيئة منزلية صحية سليمة؛ فمن ذلك قوله ﷺ: «خمّروا الآنية وأوكؤوا الأسقية.» وهذه التوصية تهدف إلى الوقاية من تلوث الطعام والشراب. وكذلك حثّ النبي ﷺ على النظافة فقال: «إن الله طيّب يُحب الطيّب، نظيف يُحب النظافة.» ومن التوجيهات النبوية المتعلقة بالبيئة المنزلية: تنظيف المداخل والأفنية، وإزالة الأذى عن الطريق، والحرص على تهوية المنازل وإنارتها. وتُؤكّد هذه التوجيهات أن الإسلام دين شامل يعتني بكل جوانب الحياة بما فيها البيئة المحيطة بالإنسان.
